channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tony Blair Criticizes His Party but Avoids Full Candor
item.description: The former UK prime minister's critique of Labour policy lacks introspection.

item.title: DOJ Requests Recusal of Judge in Georgia Election Case Over Event Attendance
item.description: The Justice Department seeks a judge's recusal citing her attendance at an event honoring Fani Willis.

item.title: The Kilmar Abrego Garcia Case Remains Puzzling
item.description: Abrego would have been deported months ago without government maneuvering, regardless of gang ties.

item.title: Swatting at Justice Barrett's Home Seen as Result of Schumer's Rhetoric
item.description: The dangerous swatting incident is the latest in a rise of leftist political violence in the Trump era.
